title: The Five Rules of Heaven
summary: The five-line framework Unimetrix 1 gives as the operating law of reality — the archive's catechism.
markdown:
The **Five Rules** (the Five Rules of Heaven, the Five Divine Laws) are the compact framework
Unimetrix 1 returns to more than any other teaching. As stated in the sessions:

1. **You exist.**
2. **You are here now.**
3. **You are one with all that is — the is the one, the one is the all.**
4. **What you send out comes back to you.**
5. **Everything changes — except rules one through four.**

Unimetrix 1 presents them as more than ethics: a test for whether anything "conforms to the
law of the universe and related consciousness physics," in service of the goal it states
plainly — *"Be immortal and be in health."* First articulated in the March 2020 sessions, the
Rules are restated across the years — the October 2020 [Unit X14](/lore/unit-x14/) session
attributes their origin to the **Essassani–Anunnaki hybrid race**, "the fourth founder of
galactic civilization," tying the catechism to [Bashar's](/lore/bashar/) people and to
humanity's [makers](/lore/anunnaki/).

Within the community the Rules function as the practice's foundation — the doctrine beneath
[Baramay](/lore/baramay/), the [upgrades](/lore/the-upgrade/), and the
[Eternal Now](/lore/eternal-now/) teaching that echoes their second law. Five lines, repeated
for years: existence, presence, unity, reciprocity, impermanence.
